hero_subtitle: Magsave ng text snippets at mga larawan. I-access kaagad mula sa kahit anong app gamit ang custom keyboard. Walang account, walang tracking — lang sa iyo.
step1_text: Magdagdag ng text snippets o mga larawan sa iyong koleksyon — addresses, signatures, QR codes, kahit ano na gusto mong gamitin ulit.
img_alt_main_view: Cutling main view na nagpapakita ng saved snippets
step2_text: Pumili mula sa mahigit 750 icons at 12 kulay upang i-organize ang iyong mga snippets. I-set ang expiration date para sa temporary snippets.
img_alt_text_details: Pag-edit ng snippet gamit ang icons at kulay
step3_text: Lumipat sa Cutling keyboard sa kahit anong app at i-tap upang mag-paste. Hindi na kailangang tumigil sa ginagawa mo.
step4_text: Piliin na i-enable ang iCloud upang panatilihing synchronized ang iyong mga snippets sa iPhone, iPad, at Mac.
why_paid_title: Bakit Ang Cutling Ay Isang Bayad na App
why_paid_emphasis: Walang ads. Walang tracking. Walang subscriptions. Walang in-app purchases.
why_paid_p1: Magbayad minsan, magkaroon magpakailanman. Kasing simple nyan.
why_paid_p2: Ang Cutling ay walang servers na kailangan i-maintain at walang database tungkol sa iyong data. Ibig sabihin nito ay mababang gastos at sustainable na app — hindi kami kailangang i-monetize ang iyong interes o impormasyon.
why_paid_p3: Walang karagdagang sales, walang “premium“ tier, walang upgrade requests. Nakakakuha ka ng buong app mula sa unang araw.
feature_text_snippets_desc: Save up to 100 text cutlings, each up to 2,000 characters.
feature_image_cutlings_desc: Save up to 25 images for quick access — QR codes, signatures, diagrams.
feature_custom_keyboard_desc: Insert cutlings from any app without switching. One tap to paste.
feature_icons_colors_desc: Choose from 750+ icons and 12 colors to organize your collection.
feature_expiration_desc: Set auto-delete dates for temporary snippets. They clean up on their own.
feature_icloud_desc: Keep cutlings in sync across all your Apple devices. Optional and private.
feature_recently_deleted_desc: Accidentally delete something? Recover it within 30 days.
feature_devices_desc: One app across all your Apple devices, with a native experience on each.
privacy_teaser_text: Cutling collects absolutely no data. No analytics. No crash reports. No third-party SDKs. Your cutlings stay on your device — or in your personal iCloud account if you choose to enable sync. The developer cannot access your data, period.
faq_a1: A cutling is a saved snippet — a piece of text or an image you want to keep handy for quick access. Think of it as a cutting from your clipboard that you can reuse anytime.
faq_q2: How do I set up the Cutling keyboard?
faq_a2: Go to Settings > General > Keyboard > Keyboards > Add New Keyboard, then select Cutling. Tap Cutling and enable “Allow Full Access.” You can also follow the setup guide inside the app.
faq_q3: Why does the keyboard need Full Access?
faq_a3: Full Access allows the keyboard to read your saved cutlings from local storage so it can display them. Cutling does not use this permission to log keystrokes, access the internet, or transmit any data. Everything stays on your device.
faq_a4: Yes. Cutling collects zero data. No analytics, no tracking, no crash reports, no third-party SDKs. Your cutlings are stored locally on your device, or in your personal iCloud account if you choose to enable sync. The developer has no way to access your data.
faq_a5: When enabled, iCloud sync uses Apple's private CloudKit database to keep your cutlings in sync across your Apple devices. Only you can access your data through your Apple ID. The developer has no access to synced data. Sync is optional — you can disable it anytime in settings.
faq_q6: Are there limits on how many cutlings I can save?
faq_a6: You can save up to 100 text cutlings and 25 image cutlings. Text cutlings support up to 2,000 characters each.
faq_a7: Yes. Cutling is available on iPhone, iPad, and Mac. With iCloud sync enabled, your cutlings stay consistent across all your Apple devices.
faq_q8: Is there a subscription or in-app purchases?
faq_a8: No. Cutling is a one-time purchase. No subscriptions, no in-app purchases, no ads. Pay once and own it forever.
faq_a9: Deleted cutlings move to a “Recently Deleted” folder where they're kept for 30 days. You can restore them during that period or let them expire automatically.
support_subtitle: Need help? We're here for you.
support_contact_text: For questions, feedback, or bug reports, email kenneth@matsuokengo.com.
support_contact_response: I aim to respond within 48 hours.
support_ts_keyboard_text: Make sure you've added the Cutling keyboard: go to Settings > General > Keyboard > Keyboards > Add New Keyboard > Cutling. Then tap Cutling and enable “Allow Full Access.”
support_ts_cutlings_text: Ensure Full Access is enabled for the Cutling keyboard. Without it, the keyboard can't read your saved cutlings from local storage.
support_ts_icloud_text: Check that iCloud is enabled on your device (Settings > [Your Name] > iCloud) and that Cutling has iCloud access. Sync may take a moment to propagate changes across devices.
support_ts_images_text: Image cutlings require Full Access. If images still don't appear, try removing and re-adding the Cutling keyboard in Settings.
support_more_help_text: Check the FAQ for answers to common questions about features, privacy, and how the app works.
privacy_summary: Cutling does not collect, store, or transmit any of your data to us. Your data stays on your device or syncs privately through your personal iCloud account (optional).
privacy_overview_text: Cutling is a keyboard extension that lets you save and quickly insert text snippets and images such as addresses, signatures, QR codes, and other frequently used content. This policy explains how the app handles your data.
privacy_collection_text: Cutling collects no personal data whatsoever. No analytics, no crash reports, no usage tracking, no advertising identifiers. The app does not contain any third-party analytics or tracking frameworks. The developer has no ability to read, access, or retrieve your data.
privacy_cutlings_text: All cutlings (text snippets and images) you create are stored locally on your device. Your data is never transmitted to the developer or any third-party servers.
privacy_icloud_intro: Cutling offers optional iCloud sync to keep your cutlings synchronized across your Apple devices. When enabled:
privacy_icloud_li1: Your cutlings sync through your personal iCloud account using Apple's private CloudKit database
privacy_icloud_li2: Only you can access your synced data through your Apple ID
privacy_icloud_li3: The developer has no access to your iCloud data
privacy_icloud_li4: You can disable sync at any time in the app's settings
privacy_icloud_outro: When iCloud sync is disabled, your data remains strictly local on your device. iCloud sync is provided by Apple and subject to Apple's iCloud Terms and Conditions.
privacy_keyboard_text: Cutling includes a custom keyboard extension that requires Full Access to read from your device's clipboard. This permission is used solely to let you paste and manage your saved cutlings. The keyboard does not log, record, or transmit your keystrokes or clipboard contents. All clipboard access occurs locally on your device.
privacy_thirdparty_text: Cutling does not use any third-party services, SDKs, or APIs. No data is sent to external servers.
privacy_children_text: Cutling does not collect data from anyone, including children under the age of 13. The app is safe for use by all ages.
privacy_changes_text: If this policy is updated, the changes will be posted on this page with a revised effective date.
privacy_changes_log: March 8, 2026: Updated to reflect the addition of image cutlings and optional iCloud sync feature. Clarified that iCloud sync is optional and can be disabled, and that synced data is stored in your personal iCloud account.
privacy_contact_text: If you have questions about this policy, you can reach the developer at kenneth@matsuokengo.com.
